Checkout
Licensing

How Licensing Works

Every HypeForType purchase gives you a perpetual license for the specific use case you choose. Licenses are per-typeface — if you buy a Desktop license for Nanami, you can use Nanami on up to 5 computers forever. Need multiple uses? The Full Bundle covers everything at a significant saving.

Desktop
£25
per single font
£45
per family

Install on up to 5 computers. For use in print, static images, and desktop publishing.

✓ OTF + TTF files
✓ PDF License
✓ Up to 5 CPUs
✓ Print & editorial use
Web
£35
per single font
£65
per family

Embed on websites via @font-face. Licensed per monthly pageview volume.

✓ WOFF2 + WOFF files
✓ PDF License
✓ 250k pageviews/month
✓ @font-face embedding
App
£55
per single font
£95
per family

Embed in a single mobile or desktop application distributed to end users.

✓ OTF + TTF files
✓ PDF License
✓ Single application
✓ iOS, Android, macOS, Windows
Broadcast
£85
per single font
£145
per family

Use in film, television, streaming content, or broadcast media.

✓ OTF + TTF files
✓ PDF License
✓ TV, Film, Streaming
✓ Unlimited broadcasts
Full Bundle
£130
per single font
£220
per family

All four license types in one purchase. Best value for studios and agencies.

✓ All file formats
✓ PDF License
✓ All use cases covered
✓ Agencies & Studios
Questions? Email licensing@hypefortype.com
